title: celmisia repens
intro: Celmisia repens, also known as New Zealand Daisy, is a perennial herb that belongs to the daisy family and is native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits associated with Celmisia repens include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antibacterial activity. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using its leaves and flowers in tincture or essential oil form, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions with other medications.
